LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING ON DEFENDANTS JOSEPH HARNEY TRUST UTD. AND JOSEPH HARNEY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ASSUMES THAT THE PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER OF DEFENDANTS JOSEPH HARNEY AND JOSEPH HARNEY TRUST, UTD. FILED JULY 24, 2013 IS THE OPPOSITION TO THIS DEMURRER. THE COURT GRANTS THE PARTIES' REQUESTS FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. THE DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. EVEN IF DEFENDANT DID NOT OWN THE PROPERTY AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT, THAT FACT DOES NOT MEAN THAT DEFENDANT ALSO RELINQUISHED CONTROL. THE PARTIES RAISE FACTUAL ISSUES THAT CANNOT BE RESOLVED ON DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS DEFENDANTS JOSEPH HARNEY, JOSEPH HARNEY TRUST UTD.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 16, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN AUGUST 13, 2013, AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Megan Symonds, Esq. of Santana and Hart, Tel. 415.276.0691, for defendants and moving party;
Milton Katz, Esq. of the Law Office of Miton Katz, Tel. 415.441.5400, for plaintiff and opposing party;
Sean Moriarty, Esq. of Cesari, Werner & Moriarty, Tel. 415.391.1113 ext.15, for defendant Franmihucer LLC, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANTs JOSEPH HARNEY TRUST UTD. and JOSEPH HARNEY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. The Court assumes that the Plaintiff's opposition to demurrer of Defendants Joseph Harney and Joseph Harney Trust, UTD. Filed July 24, 2013 is the opposition to this demurrer. The Court grants the parties' requests for judicial notice. The demurrer to the amended complaint is overruled. Even if defendant did not own the property at the time of the accident, that fact does not mean that defendant also relinquished control. The parties raise factual issues that cannot be resolved on demurrer. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Pltff'S Amendment To Complaint

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANTs JOSEPH HARNEY, JOSEPH HARNEY TRUST UTD.'s Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Amendment To Complaint is Continued to September 16, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 13, 2013, at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.
